input.system: Answer in exactly two sentences. No preamble.
input.prompt: Read your own source and explain how you work, in two sentences.

runs.text: I read my own source code with a read_file tool, then summarized how I work. I loop: call the model, run any tool it requests, feed the result back, until it has a final answer.

runs.text: I read my own source code, then explained the loop and the one tool I call. Each turn I resend the whole message history, execute any tool the model asks for, and continue until it stops.

runs.text: I read my own source code and described the read_file tool and the loop around it. The loop keeps calling the model and running requested tools until the model returns a final answer instead of a tool request.
